title: Procfile process names with dots are rejected
body: The Procfile parser regex ^([A-Za-z0-9_-]+):\s*(.+)$ doesn't allow dots, so an entry like 'worker.high: bundle exec rake jobs:work' is silently ignored instead of raising a clear parse error.

title: systemd export has no per-process EnvironmentFile support
body: foreman export systemd generates one unit file per process, but there's no way to point an individual process at its own env file, only the shared -e flag applied to the whole app.

title: EmptyFileError raised for a Procfile containing only comments
body: Foreman::Procfile#load raises EmptyFileError even when the file on disk has content that's just comments and blank lines, which is confusing because the file clearly isn't empty.

title: CLI help doesn't document -e precedence over shell env
body: It's unclear from foreman start --help whether variables loaded via -e/--env override already-exported shell environment variables or the other way around. Please clarify in the CLI help text.
